case_title: KHANH NGUYEN VS. GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $1,289.01 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,349.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,298.01 FILED BY NGUYEN, KHANH AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
